name: nightgauge-vscode
description: The cockpit for the Nightgauge autonomous software factory — queue your backlog, watch the pipeline run dark, review evidence for every merge.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Welcome to Nightgauge.

This repository isn't set up for Nightgauge yet. Run the quick setup steps below to get started — nothing is written to your repo until you opt in.

[$(rocket) Initialize Repository](command:nightgauge.quickstartRepoInit)
[$(book) Make Repo AI-Ready](command:nightgauge.quickstartSmartSetup)
[$(info) Learn More](command:nightgauge.quickstartLearnMore)

Initialize creates .nightgauge/config.yaml, standard labels, and links your GitHub Project board. AI-Ready adds AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and focused docs for agent use.

No active pipeline.
Drag an issue or epic from Ready Items to start.

This repository isn't set up for Nightgauge yet.

[$(rocket) Initialize Repository](command:nightgauge.quickstartRepoInit)
[$(book) Make Repo AI-Ready](command:nightgauge.quickstartSmartSetup)

Run a query to see results.
[Query Project Items](command:nightgauge.queryProjectItems)

No knowledge entries yet.
Run the pipeline or create entries manually.

$(check) All clear
No decisions pending. The fleet is steering itself.

commands.title: Nightgauge: Run All Issues in Epic
Nightgauge: View Queued Issue on GitHub
Repositories: Include All Repos in Autonomous Scan
Repositories: Exclude All Repos from Autonomous Scan

nightgauge.cloud.enabled.description: Enable cloud features (hosted dashboard, team management, remote pipeline control, accounts, billing). Off by default while cloud is in development — the entire local pipeline runs free without it. Turning this on reveals the account, subscription, and team command surface.

nightgauge.dashboardUrl.description: Base URL for the Nightgauge web dashboard. Deep-link commands append route paths to this value.

enumDescriptions: Opus — most capable; recommended for hard work
Fable 5 — premium frontier tier, ~2× Opus cost. Applies to EVERY stage; use deliberately or prefer the 'frontier' performance mode which limits Fable to reasoning stages.
nightgauge.defaultModel.description: Default model for pipeline stages. Automatic routing never selects Fable; setting it here forces Fable on every stage.

nightgauge.contextPath.description: Path to pipeline context files relative to git root

nightgauge.plansPath.description: Path to plan files relative to git root

enumDescriptions: Gemini 2.5 Pro — most capable, best for complex tasks
nightgauge.gemini.model.description: Default Gemini model for pipeline stages

enumDescriptions: Smart composite sort: Priority → Unblocked → Size → Age (Recommended)
nightgauge.readyItems.sortBy.description: Sort ready issues by this field

enumDescriptions: Ascending (P0 first, lowest number first, XS first)
Descending (P2 first, highest number first, XL first)
nightgauge.readyItems.sortDirection.description: Sort direction for project board issues

enumDescriptions: P0 (Critical) - Urgent issues requiring immediate attention
P1 (High) - Important issues to address soon
P2 (Medium/Low) - Issues to address when time permits
nightgauge.readyItems.filters.priority.description: Filter project board issues by priority level

enumDescriptions: XL (Extra Large) - Major feature, week or more
nightgauge.readyItems.filters.size.description: Filter project board issues by size estimate

nightgauge.readyItems.filters.component.description: Filter project board issues by component label (e.g., 'nightgauge', 'smart-setup')

nightgauge.readyItems.filters.hideBlocke.description: Hide blocked issues from project board views (only show actionable work)

nightgauge.readyItems.searchText.description: Search text to filter issues by title or number (e.g., 'authentication' or '#144')

nightgauge.readyItems.showDependencies.description: Show dependency indicators (blocked by/blocks) and expandable dependency tree

nightgauge.outputWindow.autoOpen.description: Automatically open output window when pipeline starts

enumDescriptions: Show standard output including info messages
Show verbose output including tool calls
Show all output including debug messages
nightgauge.outputWindow.verboseLevel.description: Amount of detail shown in output window

nightgauge.outputWindow.showTokenUsage.description: Show real-time token usage and cost estimation

nightgauge.outputWindow.wordWrap.description: Enable word wrap for long lines in output window

nightgauge.dashboard.timeSavings.issuePi.description: Estimated manual minutes for issue pickup stage

nightgauge.dashboard.timeSavings.feature.description: Estimated manual minutes for feature planning stage
Estimated manual minutes for feature development stage

nightgauge.dashboard.timeSavings.prCreat.description: Estimated manual minutes for PR creation stage

nightgauge.dashboard.timeSavings.prMerge.description: Estimated manual minutes for PR merge stage

nightgauge.dashboard.health.enabled.description: Enable the pipeline health dashboard widget

nightgauge.dashboard.health.collapsed.description: Default collapse state for the health widget

nightgauge.dashboard.health.weights.toke.description: Weight for token efficiency trend in health score (auto-normalized)

nightgauge.dashboard.health.weights.succ.description: Weight for success rate in health score (auto-normalized)

nightgauge.dashboard.health.weights.cost.description: Weight for cost trend in health score (auto-normalized)

nightgauge.dashboard.health.weights.cach.description: Weight for cache hit rate in health score (auto-normalized)

nightgauge.dashboard.health.weights.pred.description: Weight for prediction accuracy in health score (auto-normalized)

nightgauge.dashboard.health.weights.fail.description: Weight for failure rate in health score (auto-normalized)

nightgauge.plugins.autoPrompt.description: Automatically prompt to install Claude plugins and Codex commands on startup

nightgauge.plugins.marketplaceUrl.description: Git URL for the Nightgauge plugin marketplace

nightgauge.notifications.sounds.alert.description: Sound for user input needed (set 'none' to disable)

nightgauge.notifications.sounds.success.description: Sound for pipeline completion (set 'none' to disable)

nightgauge.notifications.sounds.error.description: Sound for pipeline errors (set 'none' to disable)

nightgauge.notifications.dockBounce.enab.markdownDescription: Bounce Dock icon when attention needed (macOS only)

nightgauge.notifications.respectDoNotDis.markdownDescription: Suppress sounds/notifications when system Do Not Disturb is enabled (macOS only)

enumDescriptions: Automated execution with token tracking (recommended for batch/multi-stage)
Conversational mode with open stdin for follow-up messages (single-stage only)
nightgauge.pipeline.defaultMode.description: Default execution mode for pipeline stages

nightgauge.pipeline.autoContinue.description: Automatically run the next pipeline stage when one completes

nightgauge.pipeline.autoContinueDelay.description: Delay in milliseconds before auto-continuing to the next stage

nightgauge.orchestration.disabled.description: Disable the multi-agent orchestration engine (epic #3899). Off by default while the engine is opt-in. The CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_WORKFLOWS environment variable forces this on regardless of setting.

nightgauge.orchestration.preferNativeOff.markdownDescription: Per-stage preference for an adapter's native `runWorkflow()` offload over the portable SdkFanoutRunner floor, when the resolved adapter declares `native-workflow`. Keys are pipeline stages (`issue-pickup`, `feature-planning`, `feature-dev`, `feature-validate`); `pr-create`/`pr-merge` are single-agent and never fanned out. A missing stage means "use the portable floor".

nightgauge.orchestration.maxUsd.description: Total USD budget cap for a single orchestrated run. Set to 0 for uncapped (default).

nightgauge.orchestration.maxAgents.description: Maximum agents spawned over a whole orchestrated run. Set to 0 to use the provider safety ceiling (default). When > 0 it can only lower the ceiling, never raise it.

nightgauge.orchestration.maxConcurrency.description: Maximum agents running at once in an orchestrated run. Set to 0 to use the provider safety ceiling (default). When > 0 it can only lower the ceiling, never raise it.

nightgauge.projectBoard.groupByEpic.description: Group issues under their parent epic in project board views

nightgauge.projectBoard.defaultEpicColla.description: Default collapse state for epic groups (false = expanded, true = collapsed)

nightgauge.batch.maxIssues.description: Maximum number of issues to process in a batch. Set to 0 for no limit (default: 50)

nightgauge.batch.pauseBetweenIssues.description: Pause and prompt for user approval between each issue in batch

nightgauge.batch.concurrency.description: Concurrent issue processing (currently only 1 is supported - parallel execution coming in future release)

nightgauge.batch.stopOnError.description: Stop batch execution immediately when any issue fails

nightgauge.batch.retryFailedIssues.description: Automatically retry failed issues in batch execution

nightgauge.batch.maxRetries.description: Maximum retry attempts for failed issues (requires retryFailedIssues enabled)

nightgauge.batch.showSummary.description: Show detailed summary when batch completes

nightgauge.batch.notifyOnComplete.description: Show notification when entire batch completes

nightgauge.batch.notifyOnEachIssue.description: Show notification after each issue completes (can cause notification fatigue for large batches)

nightgauge.batch.showProgressEstimate.description: Show estimated time remaining based on average issue completion time

nightgauge.batch.tokenBudget.description: Maximum total tokens to consume in batch (0 = unlimited). Batch stops when limit reached.

nightgauge.batch.costBudget.description: Maximum total cost in USD for batch (0 = unlimited). Batch stops when limit reached.

nightgauge.batch.timeBudget.description: Maximum total time in minutes for batch (0 = unlimited). Batch stops when limit reached.

nightgauge.batch.saveHistory.description: Save batch execution history to workspace storage

nightgauge.batch.historyLimit.description: Maximum number of batch runs to keep in history (rolling window)

nightgauge.sidebar.hideEmptySections.description: Hide sidebar sections that have no items

nightgauge.audit.legacyEndpoint.description: Use the deprecated /api/v1/audit/events alias instead of the canonical /v1/audit-log endpoint. Temporary rollback switch — will be removed when the alias is sunset (2027-05-08).

nightgauge.telemetry.enabled.description: Send anonymous usage data to help improve Nightgauge. Opt-in only — no data is sent until you enable this. See docs/TELEMETRY_PRIVACY.md for what is collected.
nightgauge.telemetry.enabled.markdownDescription: Send anonymous usage data to help improve Nightgauge. **Opt-in only** — no data is sent until you enable this. See [TELEMETRY_PRIVACY.md](command:nightgauge.openTelemetrySettingsPanel) for what is collected.

nightgauge.telemetry.streams.description: Telemetry streams that may send data when telemetry is enabled.

nightgauge.telemetry.uploadIntervalMinut.description: How often (in minutes) the telemetry queue flushes when telemetry is enabled.

nightgauge.warnings.enabled.description: Enable warnings when dragging issues that are already in progress or under review

nightgauge.warnings.warnOnInProgress.description: Warn when dragging In Progress issues (requires warnings.enabled)

nightgauge.warnings.warnOnInReview.description: Warn when dragging In Review issues (requires warnings.enabled)

nightgauge.agentTeams.enabled.description: Enable agent teams for parallel pipeline execution (requires Claude Code CLI)

nightgauge.agentTeams.maxTeammates.description: Maximum number of parallel teammate sessions

enumDescriptions: Claude Sonnet — balanced speed and quality (default)
Run teammates in tmux panes (requires tmux)

nightgauge.agentTeams.planApproval.description: Require lead agent approval of teammate plans

nightgauge.agentTeams.delegateMode.description: Restrict lead agent to coordination only

enumDescriptions: Split budget proportional to task complexity (default)
nightgauge.agentTeams.tokenBudgetSplit.description: How to divide token budget across teammates

nightgauge.agentTeams.fileOwnership.description: Enable file ownership hints in sub-issues

nightgauge.limits.monthlyBudgetUsd.description: Monthly API cost budget in USD. Set to 0 to disable usage tracking and alerts.

nightgauge.limits.warningThresholdPct.description: Percentage of monthly budget at which a warning notification fires.

nightgauge.limits.criticalThresholdPct.description: Percentage of monthly budget at which a critical alert fires.

nightgauge.limits.pollingIntervalSeconds.description: How often (in seconds) to check usage against the budget threshold.

nightgauge.backend.useGoBinary.description: Use Go binary for project board data (falls back to TypeScript if unavailable)

nightgauge.backend.binaryPath.description: Path to nightgauge Go binary. Leave empty to search PATH.

nightgauge.backend.timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for Go backend operations

nightgauge.git.autoCleanupBranches.description: Automatically delete local branches whose remote tracking branch was removed after PR merge. Runs on extension startup.

scripts.build: npm run generate:contributions && npm run build:types && npm run build:bundle && npm run build:notices && npm run build:assets
scripts.build:assets: mkdir -p dist && cp ../nightgauge-sdk/src/analysis/failure-taxonomy.yaml dist/failure-taxonomy.yaml && cp ../nightgauge-sdk/src/eval/model-registry.json dist/model-registry.json && bash scripts/bundle-marketplace.sh
